name: The Pale Majority
specialty: Specializing in navigating the chaotic rifts, The Pale Majority is renowned for their unparalleled ability to traverse the tears in reality, often retrieving lost artifacts or escaping perilous situations.

members.name: Seraphina Moros
members.note: The eldest of the trio, her eyes are a chilling pale blue, a constant reminder of the rifts she's witnessed

members.name: Thaddeus Graven
members.note: His weathered face is marked with scars from countless battles, his keen nose able to trace even the faintest scent

members.name: Silas Ashwind
members.note: His silvery hair is often obscured by a hood, concealing the scar that runs down his left cheek from a near-fatal rift encounter

visual: Dressed in dark leathers, they move with a practiced grace, their equipment including a rift-navigating device and a set of unique, enchanted blades. They carry themselves with a quiet confidence, rarely speaking but always aware.
reputation_note: While they're not affiliated with any faction, they're known to be the only crew who can be relied upon for rift navigation, their name whispered in hushed tones among the Undercity's inhabitants
